title: idmodel v1 correspondence map
description: Maps a logical continuity line (keyed by its first-seen Tier-1 logical_id) to its occurrences over revisions. Refactor tolerance lives HERE, not in the Tier-1 hash: a move/rename CHANGES the Tier-1 logical_id, and continuity is preserved by these authored/inferred entries with confidence, mapping-origin, manual overrides, and a lifecycle label (validation #3). The rename/move auto-detection heuristic is OUT OF SCOPE for v1 — this schema + the golden fixtures prove the CONTRACT.

scenario.description: Optional human label for the continuity line (e.g. rename/move/split/merge).

logical_id.description: The continuity line's key: the FIRST-seen Tier-1 logical_id (lowercase hex SHA-256). Subsequent revisions may carry a DIFFERENT logical_id (see entries[].logical_id) — that is expected and is the whole reason this map exists.

revision.description: Revision identifier (commit/digest/label) this occurrence belongs to.

occurrence_id.description: Tier-2 occurrence/evidence id for this revision (canon semantic-content digest of the occurrence record). PROVENANCE only — never cross-revision identity.

logical_id.description: The Tier-1 logical_id of the entity AS COMPUTED FOR THIS REVISION. May differ from the map's top-level logical_id after a rename/move/split/merge/sig-change — that delta is the refactor event.

file.description: Provenance: the file the occurrence was found in (NOT part of the Tier-1 key).

span.description: Provenance: the source span (line/byte offsets) of the occurrence.

confidence.description: Mapping confidence in [0,1]. Represented as a STRING decimal (e.g. "0.92") or a scaled integer (e.g. 92 for hundredths) — NEVER a JSON float, per canon (floats are forbidden in canonical content).

mapping_origin.description: How the mapping was produced: extracted = directly observed at the same key; inferred = heuristic rename/move detection; manual = human-asserted.

lifecycle.description: The lifecycle event for this occurrence within the continuity line (verbatim v1 enum, Phase 0B).

manual_override.description: True if a human overrode the auto-detected mapping. Manual overrides win over inferred mappings.
